title: Yona of the Dawn
sourceNotes: Anime complete at 24 episodes (2014-2015), faithfully adapting ch 1-47 (no filler). Manga concluded December 2025 at 47 volumes (~280 chapters; AniList chapter count not yet finalized). Post-anime arcs (Kai Empire, Sky Tribe rebellion, Final Battle) are unadapted.

mappings.arc: Kai Empire / Sky Tribe Rebellion / Final Arc (unadapted)
